steps.title: Identify what illustrates the contrast
steps.content: Mansfield's technique is to show the girl's pleasant appearance alongside her unpleasant attitude in the same moment. A quotation that illustrates this must display both—attractive physical qualities and contemptuous, displeased behavior—occurring together, not separately.

steps.title: Find both elements in one quote
steps.content: Choice B pairs “lovely nose” (pleasant appearance) with her shaking the puff “as though she loathed it” (unpleasant attitude), creating the exact contrast the prompt describes. The other three present only her behavior and reactions without mentioning her appearance. That matches choice B — B is correct.
